mapper.sql:
h.id ,p.user_id ,h.point_id ,h.dr_cr ,h.cr_point_type ,GET_CODE_NAME('point_type', h.cr_point_type) AS crPointTypeName /* 대변, 적립 자본증가 */ ,h.dr_point_type ,GET_CODE_NAME('point_type', h.dr_point_type) AS drPointTypeName /* 차변, 지급 소멸 */
,h.amount ,h.avail_amount
,h.expiration_period_yn ,h.memo
,h.create_date ,h.create_id
mapper.select:
/* getMyPointHistory */ SELECT
FROM tb_mbm_user u LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_point p ON u.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_point_history h ON p.id = h.point_id
ORDER BY h.id ASC
ORDER BY h.id DESC

SELECT
FROM tb_mbm_user u LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_point p ON u.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_point_history h ON p.id = h.point_id WHERE h.id = #{searchHistoryId}
mapper.update: /* PointHistoryEntity */ UPDATE tb_mbm_point_history SET dr_cr = IFNULL(#{drCr }, dr_cr ) ,dr_point_type = IFNULL(#{drPointType }, dr_point_type ) ,amount = IFNULL(#{amount }, amount ) ,avail_amount = IFNULL(#{availAmount }, avail_amount ) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
/* getMyPointHistoryNew */ SELECT h.id, p.user_id, h.point_id, h.dr_cr, GET_CODE_NAME('point_drcr', h.dr_cr) AS drCrName, h.cr_point_type, GET_CODE_NAME('point_type', h.cr_point_type) AS crPointTypeName,
h.amount AS display_amount, h.avail_amount,
NULL AS act_amt, NULL AS detailDrPointTypeName, NULL AS dr_point_type,
h.create_date, 1 AS sort_order FROM tb_mbm_point p INNER JOIN tb_mbm_point_history h ON p.id = h.point_id WHERE p.user_id = #{searchUserId}
UNION ALL
SELECT h.id, p.user_id, h.point_id, h.dr_cr, GET_CODE_NAME('point_drcr', h.dr_cr) AS drCrName, h.cr_point_type, GET_CODE_NAME('point_type', h.cr_point_type) AS crPointTypeName,
NULL AS display_amount, NULL AS avail_amount,
d.act_amt, GET_CODE_NAME('point_type', d.dr_point_type) AS detailDrPointTypeName, d.dr_point_type,
h.create_date, 2 AS sort_order FROM tb_mbm_point p INNER JOIN tb_mbm_point_history h ON p.id = h.point_id LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_point_history_detail d ON h.id = d.history_id WHERE IFNULL(act_amt, 0) != 0 AND p.user_id = #{searchUserId} ORDER BY id DESC, create_date, sort_order
